tests.test_name: Multi-file toggle is visible in the input panel
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — toggle and lock behavior

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: A user visiting the Analyze page can see the multi-file toggle in the input panel.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Multi-file toggle is visible in the input panel
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Analysis API and multi-file API are mocked; user is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The multi-file toggle is visible in the input panel

tests.test_name: Multi-file toggle shows a lock icon when not logged in
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — toggle and lock behavior

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: An unauthenticated user sees a lock icon on the multi-file toggle, indicating the feature requires sign-in.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Multi-file toggle shows a lock icon when not logged in
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The multi-file toggle displays a lock icon

tests.test_name: Clicking the multi-file toggle when not logged in shows a sign-in prompt
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — toggle and lock behavior

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: An unauthenticated user who clicks the multi-file toggle receives a warning toast and multi-file mode remains disabled.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Clicking the multi-file toggle when not logged in shows a sign-in prompt
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: A warning toast 'Sign in to use multi-file mode.' is shown and multi-file mode is not enabled

tests.test_name: Hovering the lock icon shows a tooltip
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — toggle and lock behavior

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: An unauthenticated user hovering over the lock icon on the multi-file toggle sees a tooltip prompting them to sign in.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Hovering the lock icon shows a tooltip
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User hovers over the lock icon on the multi-file toggle
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: A tooltip reading 'Sign in to unlock' is visible

tests.test_name: Clicking the lock icon navigates to the login page
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — toggle and lock behavior

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: An unauthenticated user clicking the lock icon is redirected to the login page.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Clicking the lock icon navigates to the login page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User clicks the lock icon on the multi-file toggle
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The user is on the login page

tests.test_name: Open lock icon is shown when logged in and is not a link
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — toggle and lock behavior

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: An authenticated user sees an open lock icon on the multi-file toggle that is purely decorative and not a navigation link.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Open lock icon is shown when logged in and is not a link
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in and on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The multi-file toggle shows an open lock icon and that icon is not a link

tests.test_name: Multi-file mode is disabled and queue is cleared when the user logs out
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — toggle and lock behavior

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: A logged-in user who enables multi-file mode and adds a file to the queue finds both features reset and the toggle locked after logging out.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Multi-file mode is disabled and queue is cleared when the user logs out
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: APIs are mocked and user is on the Analyze page (via Background)
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User enables multi-file mode, adds a fixture file to the queue, logs out, and returns to the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Multi-file mode is not enabled, the file queue is not visible, and the toggle shows a lock icon
